text: A realistic automotive engineering photo showing a Price. Replace the dual LED lamps used for rear license plate illumination with a pair of single LED lamps., detailed 4k, hyperrealistic

Wheel lug nut in MGI-
Overall length - 31.3mm
Thread length - 27.95mm
Wheel lug nut in KIA-
Overall length - 27.5mm
Thread length - 15mm, detailed 4k, hyperrealistic
